zh.lifeSummary: Lady Frances Newton of Cobham於1539年10月17日出生在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾。她於1556年之前與Wedderall在英國越可爾利朋結婚。她去世於1592年10月17日在英國肯特可巴姆享年53歲，埋葬在英國肯特可巴姆。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Lady Frances Newton of Cobham于1539年10月17日出生在英国英格兰格盧斯特斯爾。她于1556年之前与Wedderall在英国越可爾利朋结婚。她去世于1592年10月17日在英国肯特可巴姆享年53岁，埋葬在英国肯特可巴姆。

nameMeanings.name: Newton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Scottish: habitational name from any of the many places in England and Scotland so named, from Old English nīwe ‘new’ + tūn ‘farmstead, settlement’, or Middle English neue ‘new’ + toun ‘settlement, town’. According to Ekwall, this is the commonest English placename. For this reason, the surname has a highly fragmented origin.

variants.name: Newtown
meanings: English (Yorkshire): variant of   Newton  . This surname is now rare in Britain.
Americanized form (translation into English) of French   Villeneuve  .

nameMeanings.name: of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Korean Kyong, Kyong Suk, Young, Chae, Chi Young, Hang, Kil, Rin, Sang Hun, Chang, Chong, Insoo, Kum, Sun Young, Yom, Young Hwan.  Cambodian Kiwan, Oeurn, Phoeun, Pich, Saroeuth, Seung, Sophath, Sophea, Yoeun, Phan, Son.  Indian Shanti, Harendra.
Indian (Uttar Pradesh): Brahmin name, from Sanskrit om, the Hindu sacred and mystic syllable uttered at the beginning of prayers.
Cambodian: written ឱម, corresponding to the exclamation of solemn affirmation, of Sanskrit origin (see 1 above), chanted by Buddhist monks.

variants.name: Oum
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Southeast Asian Heang, Hye, Kam, Kan, Kheng, Khin, Kun, Sang, Sok, Phong, Yom, Yoo, Youn, Cuong, Phal, Samnang, Tin.  Cambodian Sokha, Chheang, Choeun, Moeun, Roeun, Sambath, Samoeun, Savuth, Soeun, Sopheap.
Cambodian: written អ៊ុំ, from a Khmer word denoting an elder sibling of one's parent (i.e. ‘uncle’ or ‘aunt’). Compare   Om   3 and   Um   2.

nameMeanings.name: Cobham
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of at least three places in southern England called Cobham, in Kent, Surrey, and Sussex.

nameMeanings.name: Frances
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Feminine form of   Francis .  In the 16th century the two spellings were used indiscriminately for both sexes, the distinction in spelling not being established until the 17th century.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

en.lifeSummary: Lady Frances Newton of Cobham was born on 17 October 1539, in Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom. She married Wedderall before 1556, in Ripon, Yorkshire, England. She died on 17 October 1592, in Cobham, Kent, England, at the age of 53, and was buried in Cobham, Kent, England.

fr.Pembrey, Carmarthenshire, Wales: Pembrey, Carmarthenshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lady Frances Newton of Cobham est née le 17 octobre 1539, à Gloucestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Elle a épousé Wedderall avant 1556, à Ripon, Everwyck, Angleterre. Elle est décédée le 17 octobre 1592, à Cobham, Kent, Angleterre, à l’âge de 53 ans, et a été enterrée à Cobham, Kent, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Lady Frances Newton of Cobham wurde am 17. Oktober 1539 in Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom geboren. Sie hat vor 1556 in Ripon, Yorkshire, England Wedderall geheiratet. Sie starb am 17. Oktober 1592 im Alter von 53 Jahren in Cobham, Kent, England und wurde in Cobham, Kent, England begraben.

ht.Pembrey, Carmarthenshire, Wales: Pembrey, Carmarthenshire, Pays de Galles, United Kingdom

it.lifeSummary: Lady Frances Newton of Cobham è nata il il 17 ottobre 1539 nel Gloucestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Lei sposato Wedderall prima del 1556, nel Ripon, Yorkshire, England. Morì il 17 ottobre 1592, nel Cobham, Kent, England, all'età di 53 anni, e fu sepolta a Cobham, Kent, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Frances Newton of Cobhamは1539年10月17日にイギリスイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアで生まれた。1556年以前にイギリスヨークシュアイアリプオンでWedderallと結婚した。彼女は1592年10月17日にイギリスケントコブハムで53歳で死去し，イギリスケントコブハムにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Frances Newton of Cobham(은)는 1539년 10월 17일 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르에서 태어났다. 그녀는 1556년 이전 영국 요르크실르 리폰에서 Wedderall(와)과 결혼했다. 그녀는 1592년 10월 17일 영국 켄트 컵함에서 53세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 켄트 컵함에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Lady Frances Newton of Cobham nasceu em 17 de outubro de 1539, em Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Ela casou-se com Wedderall antes 1556, em Ripon, Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Ela faleceu em 17 de outubro de 1592, em Cobham, Kent, Inglaterra, com 53 anos, e foi sepultada em Cobham, Kent, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Lady Frances Newton of Cobham родилась 17 октября 1539 г. в местности глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Wedderall перед 1556 г. в местности рипон, еркшир, Англия. Она умерла 17 октября 1592 г. в местности кобхам, кэнт, Англия в возрасте 53 лет и была похоронена в местности кобхам, кэнт, Англия.

Murió el 17 de octubre de 1592, en Cobham, Kent, Inglaterra, a la edad de 53 años, y fue sepultada en Cobham, Kent, Inglaterra.
